titleStmt.title: SII 18.354: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 354. (B.K. No. 41 of 1932-33.) DIḌGŪR, HAVERI TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Broken slab in the temple of Hanumantadeva.

summary.p: This incomplete inscription describes the valour of Tailapadēva of the Jīmūtavāhana lineage and Khachara family. The portion giving his genealogy is broken off. It belongs to the 12th century A.D.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
cāravē traiḷōkyanagarā raṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya
mahāśabda mahāmaṁḍaḷēśvaraṁ vijayalakṣmīkā
tavāhanānvayaprasūtaṁ baṁdhujanaka
ttaṁsaṁ padmāvatīdēvilabdhavaraprasādaṁ sarasijāmōdaṁ brigu
darōdaroḍḍaḷivaṁ sāhasōttuṁgaṁ saṁgrāmabhīmaṁ parasai
pāyanārāyaṇanudāramahēśvaraṁ satyarādhēya
nāputra parākramadhavaḷaṁ dānavinōdanūrjitapuṇyaṁ va
parahitacaritaṁ gōtrapavitraṁ māvanasiṁgaṁ sakaḷayācaka
vaḷīvirājitayaśarappa śrīmattailapadēvana mahimōnnatiye
nripasaṁtatiyoḷu mācarasaṁ puṭṭalātanigaṁ tanūjaṁ khyā
bhūcakraṁ pogaḷe negaḷdanuragapatākaṁ . vṛtta . kāḷala dēviyaṁ
janaikamāteyaṁ pāḷitagōtreyaṁ kuṭiḷakuṁtaḷeyaṁ vibhumā ci
ṁbhavajayāvahayaṁ dhare mecce niccaluṁ kēḷele baṇnikuṁ budhanidhāneya nitara
beḷasellaṁ kuṁdaveṁduṁ pusi pasiU baṟaṁ mārimikkirddini byā kuḷadiṁda
gaḷu dhanakanakāvriṣṭitartōbhanaṁ nāḍoḷagellaṁ taṁna rājyōdayaduḷeni
sarvvajñanō naḷanō māṁdhātanō rāmanō nriganō hariścaṁdranō tailadēva . Udayā
yaṁ sāśvatapadavipadaṁ mūrtti cittōdbhavākārada tējōmūrtti mārggaṁ gaḷa
śaramārggakramaṁ vikramamādigaṁtabyāptiyeṁdoḍītailanaṁ baṇnisalaḷave paṁ
gamā padmajaṁga . ciṁtāmaṇi surabhūruhamiṁtuṁ ciṁtisade bēḍadīya
ciṁtisade bēḍadiveḍegiṁtana pamadāni tailadēvanripāḻaṁ . saṁgararaṁgadoḻasi
yeṁbaṁgane tailanripana tōḷinalirdduṁ tāṁ piṁgade ripunripasēneya nuṁgalu baya
stuttavirppaḻatimudadiṁda . dhuradoḻidirccitāguvara nānaṟiyeṁ kali tailabhūpanoḷa
ra muridukkitāgidate tōṟane taṁna bhujāsidhāreyiṁ nararudhiraṁ
diridu pāṟuva paṁdale khaṁḍadiṁḍeyoḷparedu siḍilda mūḷegaḷa beṭṭugaḷiṭṭaḻa
mājiraṁgadoḷuṁ . Uṟadidirāda vairigaḷa peṁḍiru tailanripāḷadēva nī
meṟeyudu niṁnidoṁdu mahimōṁnatiyaṁ raṇaraṁgabhūmiyoḷu maṟe
yuge kāvudeṁdu nijavallabharaṁ khacarādhinātha nīṁ maṟeyade niṁnadoṁdu kulapaddha
tiyaṁ nenedeṁma rakṣisuṁ .The record
Digital edition of SII 18.354 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
